name: paper-vault
description: Search IVF/reproductive medicine papers online, extract structured metadata, and generate linked Obsidian markdown notes with taxonomy-based tagging. Supports direct Google Drive PDF import.

paper-search-mcp-openai-v2.description: Search papers from PubMed, arXiv, and Semantic Scholar

obsidian.description: Read and write notes to the Obsidian vault (create, edit, search, list)

gdrive.description: Read PDF files and metadata directly from Google Drive Shared Drive — no Desktop sync required
